rationale: No wildfire events, no significant EU energy shock, and Iran deal talks continue without breakthrough; Portugal largely unaffected this cycle.

top_events.title: Trump halts Iran strikes, claims deal near
top_events.summary: Continuation of last cycle's narrative; mild positive for EU energy costs if deal materializes, but no confirmation yet.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands on migration
top_events.summary: Pope highlights perilous migrant journeys near Spain/Portugal's Atlantic sphere; politically relevant but no direct policy impact on Portugal.

top_events.title: Extreme rain kills rare orangutans in Indonesia
top_events.summary: Climate/biodiversity story; distant from Portugal, no direct impact.
